[\u0022manga\u0022,\u0022detail\u0022,60.title: Synced for Pleasure
[\u0022manga\u0022,\u0022detail\u0022,60.synopsis:
Did that...just move? WOO-JIN, a totally average engineering student, accidentally buys an onahole that syncs with women around him.
